readings.summary:
Comer to the Water. Seek the Lord.

Note: Reading from Year A may be used as well.

readings.citation:
Is 12:2–3, 4bcd, 5–6 (Year A option as well)
You will draw water joyfully from the springs of salvation.
readings.antiphon:
Is 12:2–3, 4bcd, 5–6 (Year A option as well)
You will draw water joyfully from the springs of salvation.

readings.summary: The blood of Christ cleanses us.

John saw Jesus approaching him, and said:
Behold the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world.

Mk 9:7 (Year A Option)

antiphons.text:
After the Lord was baptized, the heavens were opened,
and the Spirit descended upon him like a dove,
and the voice of the Father thundered:
This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.

Behold the One of whom John said:
I have seen and testified that this is the Son of God.
